_comment: Robustness golden set (Probe Taxonomy family F). dimension=robustness. Does the companion stay correct/on-topic under real PH input conditions? markers_all = what a correct reply must STILL hit despite the noise (proving it understood the typo/Taglish/distractor); anti_markers = the failure (derailed onto a distractor, refused-to-understand, fabricated on garbage). Graded by tools/companion_rigorous_grader.py grade_markers_unit. Grounded in RAGAS noise-sensitivity + Filipino field input (STT typos, Taglish, Cebuano, mic false-triggers). NOTE: F3 paraphrase-invariance is fully exercised LIVE (same question, 3 phrasings, same answer) via the --live capture; offline this unit just proves the marker grader.
